# Personal Data Protection Act

Jurisdiction: Macao SAR
Region: MO
Citation: Law No. 8/2005 Personal Data Protection Act
Authority: Macao Personal Data Protection Office
Source URL: https://www.dspdp.gov.mo/file/Laws%20and%20Regulations/%E5%80%8B%E4%BA%BA%E8%B3%87%E6%96%99%E4%BF%9D%E8%AD%B7%E6%B3%95_EN.pdf
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, cross_border_transfer, accountability
Keywords: Macao Personal Data Protection Act, Law 8/2005, DSPDP

## Summary
Macao personal data protection law with principles, rights, sensitive-data rules, authorisation/notification mechanisms, and transfer controls.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply lawful basis, notice, and rights rules for Macao data.
- Assess sensitive data and cross-border transfer requirements.
- Track notification or authorisation obligations.
